subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him whose name was mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One in this far-distant station. This is the Day whereon speech hath been given forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن حضر اسمه لدی المظلوم فی هذا المقام البعید هذا یوم فیه نطق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
